prompt: Make the scene more windy. Add some motion to the parachuting army and the grass.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Introduce strong wind effects throughout the scene. Additionally, depict the grass in the foreground and midground swaying and bending in response to the wind.
objects: Numerous parachuting soldiers, visibly affected by strong wind
